seed_problem: Assign frequencies to transmitters minimizing total interference conflicts under a channel budget; checker scores baseline_conflicts/achieved.
mutation: composite: generalized same-channel conflict into distance-graded separation penalty w*max(0,s-|c_u-c_v|) (frequency-assignment with separation constraints) AND restricted channels to a tight budget K below the graph's needs, skinned as ski-resort lift radio retuning
title: Powder Peak Lift Radio Retuning
strategies: trivial baseline: tune every lift to channel 1 (reproduces the checker baseline B)
weighted-degree greedy: order lifts by total interference weight, assign each the channel minimizing added penalty vs already-tuned neighbors
greedy init + iterated local search: sweep all lifts repeatedly, re-tuning each to its best channel given current neighbors until a local optimum
randomized multi-restart / min-conflicts style local search over channel assignments
